$comment: Layer A for DUES vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (REDEFINES R1a). Generated cents span the PIC 9(6) range; each is read as text, NUMVAL'd into WS-CENTS, and reinterpreted through the REDEFINES view. The small-value bias exercises the sub-dollar region and the tier boundary.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 DUES (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-dues)
